privileged_info_summary: All Docker resources are synthetically created. The task sets up: 3 running production containers (prod-web, prod-cache, prod-api) and 1 stopped preserved container (staging-db-snapshot); 4 stopped containers to be removed (old-dev-server, test-runner-0412, failed-build-temp, expired-worker); 1 config volume to preserve (persistent-config with prod_mode=true) and 3 volumes to remove (old-test-data, build-cache-vol, tmp-upload-vol); 2 networks to remove (deprecated-frontend, old-backend-net); and ~4 dangling images created by rebuilding and removing tags. A cleanup report must be written to /home/ga/cleanup-report.txt after task execution.
